Container.Name: music-khord-indexer
Container.Overview:
Firehose indexer for Khord. Subscribes to the AT Protocol relay firehose and writes songs, votes, and proposals into a local SQLite database, enabling the Khord app to serve a fast feed without fetching each user's PDS individually.
The Data Path must be set to the same directory as in the khord container so both containers share the same SQLite database file.
This container has no web interface. Start the khord container first. The indexer resumes from where it left off after a restart — no data is lost.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Directory where the SQLite database is stored. Must be the same path used in the khord container; both containers share the same database file.

Config.Name: Database File Name
Config.Description: File name of the SQLite database stored in the Data Path directory. Only change this if you need to rename the database file. Must match the Database File Name set in the khord container.

Config.Name: Firehose Relay
Config.Description: AT Protocol firehose relay URL. The default (wss://bsky.network) connects to the main Bluesky network and is correct for almost all installations. Only change this if you are running a custom AT Protocol relay.
